CustomField.formula: IF(OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Fra_Tech_Which_Service__c, '00G3X000006XOWbUAO-Flex'), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, 'QUOTE ELOQUA')), AND( CONTAINS($Label.FRA_SAOC_Queues_Level_Zero, SUBSTITUTE(TEXT(Fra_Tech_Which_Service__c), '-SAOC', '')), OR(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, 'VIP'), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, 'Duplicate'), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, 'AUCTION QUOTE')))), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Red Flag"), "")
CustomField.label: Priority Omni
